title: Western Blotting Protocol
author: Yuan Yao
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qaddsa6
materials: Sit on Room Temperature for 20 min.
Develop the membrane with ChemiDoc MP Imaging system (BIO-RAD).

steps.title: Incubate E
steps.instruction: Incubate E.coli cells 1:100 in 10 ml LB medium with antibiotics.

steps.title: OD600=0
steps.instruction: OD600=0.4 , collect all cells at 4 ℃, 8000 rpm for 10 min.

steps.title: Resuspend in 500 ul 1 * PBS and sonicate
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 500 ul 1 * PBS and sonicate.

steps.title: Transfer supernatant into a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant into a new 1.5 ml tube and sit on ice.

steps.title: Load into 120% SDS-PAGE gel ,...
steps.instruction: Load into 120% SDS-PAGE gel , run at 200v for 45 min.

steps.title: Get the PVDF membrane and filter paperPVDF
steps.instruction: Get the PVDF membrane and filter paperPVDF: Put in methanol (5s) then in transfer bufferFilter: transfer bufferGel: transfer buffer

steps.title: Transfer membrane at 25 V for 30 min
steps.instruction: Transfer membrane at 25 V for 30 min.

steps.title: Blook woth 5% skim milk RT for 1 hour
steps.instruction: Blook woth 5% skim milk RT for 1 hour.

steps.title: Wash the membrane with 1* PBST...
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane with 1* PBST for 3 times (15 min , 10 min, 5 min).

steps.title: Wash the membrane with 1* PBST...
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane with 1* PBST for 3 times (15 min , 10 min, 5 min).

steps.title: Incubate the membrane with Mix solution for 5 s
steps.instruction: Incubate the membrane with Mix solution for 5 s.
